hero.sub: Freelance web developer from Romania — crafting fast, modern websites for businesses, restaurants, legal firms, and startups. React, Tailwind, Supabase & more.

about.para_1: I'm a passionate freelance web developer based in Romania, specializing in building fast, beautiful, and functional websites. With 3+ years of experience, I've helped a lot of businesses launch and scale their online presence.
about.para_2: I believe great web development is not just coding, is optimization and alligment with the brand.
about.highlight_1: Clean, maintainable code with best practices

services.sub: Every project starts with understanding your business — then delivering something that actually drives results.
services.service_1_desc: Professional presentation sites for law firms, medical offices, service companies, built for speed, SEO, and client trust.
services.service_2_desc: Restaurants, bars, cafes, online reservations, menus, social links, Google Maps, all designed to drive foot traffic.
services.service_3_desc: Full-stack apps with React frontends, Node.js or Spring backends, PostgreSQL or MongoDB databases.
services.service_4_desc: Speed audits, Core Web Vitals, structured data (Schema.org), and technical SEO to rank higher and load faster.

work.heading: Live Projects
work.sub: Real websites, live in production, built for real clients across different industries.
work.p1_desc: Professional presentation website for a bailiff office. Built with full SEO optimization, structured data (Schema.org), and a trust-focused editorial design.
work.p2_desc: Custom website for a café/bar featuring a bespoke Admin Panel built with Supabase for real-time menu and content management.

contact.sub_1: Whether you need a business site, a web app, or want to improve your existing one — I'm here.
contact.sub_2: Have a specific vision in mind? Or just starting to explore possibilities? Let's discuss your project — response within 24 hours.
contact.form_sent_desc: I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

seo.title: Craciunoiu Petru | Freelance Web Developer & Software Engineer
seo.desc: Expert freelance web developer from Romania. I build fast, high-performance websites for businesses, restaurants, and law firms using React, Tailwind, and Node.js.
seo.keywords: freelance web developer, Romania, web development, React, Tailwind CSS, professional business websites, SEO optimization
seo.og_desc: Premium web development services tailored to your business needs.
